about.title: Sobre mi
about.header: Desenvolupador Backend | Competent en Frontend | Programador de Videojocs
about.text-1: Desenvolupador Backend amb experiència professional en programació i desenvolupament.
about.text-2: Graduat en Desenvolupament de Videojocs (Tecnocampus – UPF), amb coneixements sòlids en desenvolupament backend i habilitats complementàries en frontend. Apassionat per crear productes eficients i escalables que ofereixin una experiència d’usuari òptima.
about.text-3: Compto amb experiència treballant en equips àgils i multidisciplinaris en projectes tècnicament exigents. Em motiva l’aprenentatge continu, la resolució de problemes i aportar valor tant al desenvolupament software com als productes interactius.

eddy.title: The Frightening Nightmare of Little Eddy

experience-1.text-2: Contribució en implementació de gameplay, mecàniques de joc, sistemes de joc, UI, àudio, VFX, tools i bug-fixing.
experience-1.text-3: Col·laboració en un equip multidisciplinari utilitzant motodologies Agile / Scrum.
experience-1.text-4: Tecnologies: C#, Unity, Git, GitHub, Jira, Confluence.

about.text-1: Desarrollador Backend con experiencia profesional en programación y desarrollo.
about.text-2: Graduado en Desarrollo de Videojuegos (Tecnocampus – UPF), con sólidos conocimientos en desarrollo backend y habilidades complementarias en frontend. Apasionado por crear productos eficientes y escalables que brinden una excelente experiencia de usuario.

about.title: About
about.header: Backend Developer | Frontend Skilled | Game Programmer
about.text-1: Backend Developer with professional experience in programming and development.
about.text-2: Graduated in Video Game Development (Tecnocampus – UPF), with solid knowledge in backend development and complementary frontend skills. I’m passionate about building efficient, scalable products that deliver a strong user experience.
about.text-3: I have experience working in agile, multidisciplinary teams on technically demanding projects. I'm driven by continuous learning, problem-solving, and contributing value to both software development and interactive products.

racerloop.title: Racerloop
racerloop.text-1: Racerloop is a free-to-play arcade spaceship racing game for PC developed in Unity. This was my first professional experience in the video game industry, working as a junior programmer in a multidisciplinary team.
racerloop.text-2: I worked on multiple areas of the game including gameplay mechanics, systems, UI, sound, VFX, tools, and bug fixing. The project was developed using agile methodologies, collaborating closely with design, art, audio, and other departments throughout development.

eddy.title: The Frightening Nightmare of Little Eddy
eddy.text-1: The Frightening Nightmare of Little Eddy is a third-person adventure game for PC combining puzzles and combat, developed in Unity by a team of six students over ten weeks as a university project.
eddy.text-2: The game received 4 out of 5 awards at the university video game festival, including the Technical Excellence award, and was also a finalist at the Fun & Serious Game Festival in the New Talents category.
eddy.text-3: I was one of the two programmers on the team, working on gameplay mechanics, AI behaviour, and general game systems. I was also responsible for sound implementation and for developing several features such as camera behaviour and other core systems.

minimax.title: Adaptive Difficulty in Board Games
minimax.text-1: Adaptive Difficulty in Board Games is the title of my Bachelor's Degree Final Project. The project focuses on the design and implementation of an AI algorithm based on Minimax that dynamically adapts its performance according to the opponent’s skill level, creating adaptive difficulty.
minimax.text-2: The algorithm was implemented and tested using a Checkers game prototype developed in Unity in order to evaluate its behaviour and effectiveness. The project received a final grade of Excellent (9.4/10).

fighters.title: Pit Fighters
fighters.text-1: Pit Fighters is a fast-paced first-person action shooter developed during the GMTK Game Jam 2020, focused on intense deathmatch-style combat against AI opponents. The game features short, chaotic rounds where the rules change every match, forcing the player to constantly adapt their strategy in order to survive and win.
fighters.text-2: The game was developed in Unity by a team of five people in under 48 hours during the game jam.

molai.title: Molai
molai.text-1: This project is a 2D puzzle-platformer created during the Global Game Jam 2020, based on the theme “Repair”. The gameplay focuses on fixing damaged elements of the environment to solve puzzles and progress. This mechanic also ties into the narrative, as repairing the world helps the protagonist recover lost memories and uncover the story.
molai.text-2: The game was developed in Unity by a team of four people in under 48 hours during the Global Game Jam.

temple.title: The Temple
temple.text-1: The Temple is a top-down shooter game inspired by Lovecraft's universe, developed in Unity by a team of four students as part of a university project.
temple.text-2: I was the main programmer on the team, implementing the core gameplay systems and handling most of the game programming tasks.
temple.text-3: My work included player controls, enemy behaviour, combat mechanics, and general gameplay logic.

experience-1.position: Junior Game Programmer | Nexxyo Labs / Maniac Panda Games
experience-1.text-1: Worked on Racerloop, a free-to-play arcade ship-racing game for PC.
experience-1.text-2: Contributed to gameplay features, game mechanics, game systems, UI, audio, VFX, tools, and bug fixing.
experience-1.text-3: Collaborated within a multidisciplinary team using Agile/Scrum methodologies.
experience-1.text-4: Technologies: C#, Unity, Git, GitHub, Jira, Confluence.

education-1.title: Bachelor’s Degree in Video Game Development | Tecnocampus (UPF)

education-2.title: Backend Development | IT Academy (Barcelona Activa - UPC)
